description: Style Note  remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this simple top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of shorts and flat strappy slip ons. Product Details  Blue floral print top has a round neck with peter pan collar, short sleeves, full buttoned placket, belt loops on the waist, a curved hem and a pleat at the back The top comes with a brown leatherette belt in a braided design   Material and Care  Rayon  Gentle machine wash  Do not bleach and flat dry only  Use cold iron  Size and Fit  Regular fit  The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
